features: 2 in 1 brush for exfoliating and revitalising feet
1 tree planted for every 100 products sold
description: Product Description This 2 in 1 lava stone brush features a natural lava stone side which helps to exfoliate and revitalise the soles of your feet by removing any tough or dead skin. The synthetic bristles on the reverse side allows you to lather on the product post feet exfoliation. Directions 1. Wet your feet. 2. Apply light pressure while scraping the scraper on your feet to remove dead skin cells. 3. Rinse your feet thoroughly. 4. Use the brush side for extra exfoliation and revitalization. 5. Rinse the brush after use. Safety Warning Apply gentle pressure while scraping to avoid injury. Always rinse feet and brush thoroughly after use to prevent infections. See more
